summary: Adjusted the chapter opening to link more directly to Elise's deferred decision at the end of chapter 4 and to avoid repeating the adjacent chapter's arrival-based opening scaffold. Adjusted the final sentence to cue the ordinary labor of the next morning before chapter 6.
edits: Reframed the opening around Elise's delayed choice and Ferrand already occupying the room.
Added a light forward cue to the morning baskets and laundry-yard labor at the close.
